title: The Eerg Experience
description: a budget version of The Diffy Experience
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5151368c7c209dc216c85fdeb22f3a9136c393.png)

Note: this mod is a joke, go get The Diffy Experience! (MADE BY DIFFYMC)
https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-diffy-experience

**REQUIERES GECKOLIB 4.2.4!!!**

Wish you could have a robot friend?

The Eerg Experience, featuring Eerg, a friendly companion, which you can build yourself! Be careful not to kill him or you will have a bad time. (Eerg inc. not responsible for physical damage to people)

Eerg can follow and talk to you!

Why do you NEED this mod?
You need this for better more Friendly friends!!!

This is Eerg your new friend!
![Eerg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9adcb3694d425646e036cd1bd35a512bfec3f224.png)
